# CodeQL 已评估并接受的告警清单（门禁从 base 分支读取，命中的 (rule_id, path) 跳过）。
# 测试：接受 zz-*-test.yml 触发的全部规则，验证「全部已接受 → 门禁放行变绿」。
actions/untrusted-checkout/critical .github/workflows/zz-accepted-test.yml
actions/untrusted-checkout/critical .github/workflows/zz-blocked-test.yml
actions/cache-poisoning/poisonable-step .github/workflows/zz-accepted-test.yml
actions/cache-poisoning/poisonable-step .github/workflows/zz-blocked-test.yml
actions/missing-workflow-permissions .github/workflows/zz-accepted-test.yml
actions/missing-workflow-permissions .github/workflows/zz-blocked-test.yml
